briefdescription.para: This function performs a polled data receive operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs a polled data send operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs an interrupt-based data receive operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.

briefdescription.para: This function performs an interrupt-based data send operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure containing transfer data.
